sentence: Only the balledgeable can name the enima before the lights come up.

wombos.definition: A situation or thing that is both deeply confusing and weirdly cinematic — a spectacle you can't look away from even though you have no idea what's happening.
Possessing a deep, specialized knowledge about something; highly informed in a particular area of passion or expertise.
wombos.example: He's so balledgeable he could teach a masterclass on the subject.
